     the Fermi energy is    -0.4354 ev

!    total energy              =  -11738.33970313 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          2.0E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08733684 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11738.25236628 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -246995.80727485 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  124597.22579014 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4203.05900560 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  114866.43872329 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.05059927 Ry

     total magnetization       =    42.02 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    52.76 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  39 iterations
